title: Graph-based Illumina SV genotyping
description: Incrementally reconstructed structural-variant genotyping from paired-end Illumina reads mapped to the Fragaria vesca pangenome graph. Only tasks supported by registered datasets and successful project evidence are included.
methods_boundary: Incremental registry of evidenced graph-based Illumina SV genotyping tasks, datasets, software, successful executions, and outputs.

tasks.title: GAM duplicate removal
evidence: existing GenomeAgent gam_deduplication scanner and validated deduplicated GAM outputs
